voice.description: Core voice commands, phonetic alphabet, calibration, dictation timing.

tiling.description: Tree-based tiling window manager with voice and keybind control.

browser.description: Bridge between BranchKit and browser extensions. Routes voice commands to page elements.

keyboard.description: Global hotkey capture, keybind registry, and input simulation.

system.description: Application registry, app switching HUD, audio control, and system settings.

windows.description: Native window management — snap, move to space, switch desktops, browser tab operations.
